content:
fitzgen closed issue #514:

Assuming that the Wasm app was given necessary capabilities (in this case, access to /dev/ dir), ensure that it is possible to properly open misc devices such as:

  • /dev/random
  • /dev/urandom
  • /dev/zero
  • /dev/null

Relevant PRs that spotted and/or fixed the bug:

  • CraneStation/wasmtime#396
  • CraneStation/wasi-common#131

fitzgen commented on issue #514:

WASI no longer in this repository, nor does it define /dev.
